questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
The numbers are
7 × 8, 8 × 9, 9 × 10, 10 × 11, 11 × 12 and 12 × 13.
Hence, number 150 is wrong and must be replaced by (12 × 13) i.e., 156.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
The first digits of the numbers form the series 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, the second digits form the series 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 and the third digits form the series 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 while the last digit in each of the numbers is 6.
Hence, number 5686 is wrong and must be replaced by 5676.

choices.c: The pattern of the series is

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body:
The given sequence is a combination of two series
I. 1, 5, 7, 11, 12        II. 5, 9, 11, 15, 17
The pattern in both I and II is + 4, + 2, + 4 + 2.
Hence, number 12 is wrong and must be replaced by (11 + 2) i.e., 13.

Hence, the number 9 is wrong and should be replaced by 8.
